title: Manage Edge Network Firewall rules
description: Configure the Edge protection for your IP address. Your firewall rules will be applied at the edge of the OVHcloud network to prevent link saturation to your service by filtering incoming traffic.
subDescription: This function should be used in conjunction with the network firewall on your server for better protection. A maximum of 20 rules per IP can be defined.
tcpNoteDescription: Please note that "TCP session state" (TCP established) refers to specific TCP protocol indicators (TCP flags), as the Edge Network Firewall does not track TCP sessions.
max_rules_reached_tooltip: You have reached the limit of allowed rules
disabled_firewall_modal_description: Are you sure you want to disable the Edge Network Firewall on IP {{ip}}?
enable_firewall_modal_description: This action will enable the Edge Network Firewall with defined rules.
enable_firewall_tooltip: Enable firewall rules for this IP address (disabling will maintain the rules only while the Scrubbing Center is active)
fragments_tooltip: You can only choose the fragment option after defining a source port and/or a destination port.
add_rule_success_message: The firewall rule will be added
delete_rule_success_message: The firewall rule will be removed
confirmDeleteRuleDescription: Do you really want to delete the firewall for this IP address?
portRangeError: Please enter a value between 0 and 65535
invalidSourceError: Please enter a valid source IPv4 address
conflictingRuleError: The port (or port range) conflicts with another rule
only_permit_rules_warning: We have only detected "Accept" rules and no "Deny" rules, so no traffic will be blocked by this configuration. We suggest the last rule to make your configuration effective. Click here  <Link>create a deny rule</Link> to add this rule.
mitigation_mode_active_warning_toltip: Mitigation is currently enabled, the firewall cannot be disabled.
firewall_not_created_tooltip: The firewall cannot be enabled until a first rule has been created.
destinationPortLowerThanSourcePortError: The destination port cannot be less than the source port
createRuleErrorMessage: There are errors in the entered data, please check the fields marked in red.
